team_composition.focus: GitHub Action, SARIF upload, benchmark infra

milestones.name: UI/UX overhaul
milestones.outcome: Findings dashboard, risk/STRIDE panels, verified-patch diff viewer

milestones.name: Workflow integration
milestones.outcome: CLI + GitHub Action + PR annotations + SARIF upload; SBOM/more scanners

milestones.name: Quality & proof
milestones.outcome: FP verifier + benchmark with published precision/recall

sprints.rationale: Highest user-visible value; the engine already produces the data these views need.
deliverables: risk graph + severity distribution + STRIDE panels
GitHub Action + PR annotations + SARIF upload (partialFingerprints)
MCP validation, localStorage, DNS-rebind, audit logging

dependencies.why: Action wraps the CLI; SARIF upload needs partialFingerprints
Benchmark measures the verifier's FP reduction

risks.risk: Docker daemon unavailable in target deploy (e.g. HF Spaces)
risks.mitigation: subprocess fallback already ships; scanners degrade gracefully

risks.risk: Live intel API rate limits (NVD 5/30s without key)
risks.mitigation: batch EPSS, cache KEV, optional NVD API key
prefer CASTLE + held-out subset; document provenance
